name: The Book of Bantorra
original_name: 戦う司書 The Book of Bantorra
overview: In a world where dead people turn into books and are stored in the Bantorra Library where anyone who reads a book can learn their past. Bantorra Library is maintained by Armed Librarians who wield psychic powers and their enemy is a religious society known as Sindeki Kyōdan.

trailers.title: 2DJ 090814 C76 Tatakau Sisho The Book of Bantorra promo DVD
